items.title: Near City Center
items.text: Located at Komuny Paryskiej 45, just 10 minutes walk from Wrocław's Old Town. Easy to reach for lunch or dinner.

items.title: Fresh, Authentic Ingredients
items.text: Traditional Indian spices imported directly from India, combined with the freshest local produce for maximum flavor.

items.title: Multiple Service Options
items.text: Enjoy our food in our cozy restaurant, order takeaway, or have it delivered to your door through popular platforms.
